title: Semiarundinaria tootsik
taxonomy: Semiarundinaria tootsik is classified under the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Semiarundinaria. As a member of the Poaceae family, Semiarundinaria tootsik is a type of bamboo. Semiarundinaria tootsik is native to East Asia, specifically in China and Japan. The exact classification of Semiarundinaria tootsik is still a subject of ongoing research and some sources might vary.
